best_unix_strategy: Use awk to track heading hierarchy by counting leading # symbols, buffer content when inside 'Overview' section and identify '### Key Metrics' subsection, then insert that buffered content after '### Fault Tolerance' in the '## Reliability' section. This requires stateful tracking of current section context and subsection nesting.
rationale: This task requires understanding heading hierarchy (## vs ###) and section boundaries to distinguish the correct 'Key Metrics' subsection from the decoy 'Metrics' heading. Line-based tools like sed/awk cannot reliably track document structure and section nesting, making precise relocation of subsections extremely error-prone.
